headline: A Look At Apollo Global Management (APO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance and business context Apollo Global Management (APO) has drawn attention after a month return of about a 2% decline and a past 3 months move of roughly a 30% decline, prompting investors to reassess its recent performance. The shares last closed at US$107.04, while the company reports annual revenue of US$31.8b and net income of US$3.5b, supported by its asset management, principal investing and retirement services segments. See our latest analysis for Apollo Global...
